title: A wire-drawing method and system
abstract: A wire-drawing method comprises providing a rod comprising a wrapped sheet, wherein the sheet comprises a plurality of copper layers and a plurality of graphene layers; extracting an inner layer of the wrapped sheet from the rod to form a spiral; and forming a wire by feeding the spiral through an opening of a die unit.
claims:
Claims A wire-drawing method, comprising: providing a rod comprising a wrapped sheet, wherein the sheet comprises a plurality of copper layers and a plurality of graphene layers; extracting an inner layer of the wrapped sheet from the rod to form a spiral; and forming a wire by feeding the spiral through an opening of a die unit. The method according to claim l, wherein the opening has at least one of an elliptic cross section and a circular cross section. The method according to claim l or 2, wherein the opening has an inclination angle with respect to a feeding direction of the spiral. The method according to claim 3, wherein the inclination angle is larger than 5Â°. The method according to claim 3 or 4, wherein the inclination angle is smaller than 30 0 . The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein forming the wire comprises: feeding the spiral through a first opening of the die unit, and subsequently feeding the spiral through a second opening of the die unit downstream of the first opening; wherein the second opening is smaller than the first opening. The method according to claim 6, wherein a cross section of at least one of the first opening and the second opening has one of an elliptic cross section and a circular cross section. The method according to claim 6 or 7, wherein the first opening has a first inclination angle with respect to a feeding direction of the spiral, and wherein the second opening has a second inclination angle with respect to a feeding direction of the spiral. 9. The method according to claim 8, wherein the first inclination angle or the second inclination angle is larger than 5 0 . 10. The method according to claim 8 or 9, wherein the first inclination angle or the second inclination angle is smaller than 30 0 . 11. The method according to any of the claims 8 to 10, wherein the second inclination angle differs from the first inclination angle. 12. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein feeding the spiral comprises pulling and/or pushing the spiral through the opening. 13. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein feeding the spiral comprises pulling the spiral through the opening by means of a plurality of rotating pulling rolls. 14. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the sheet comprises a first copper layer on a first surface side and a second copper layer on a second surface side opposite from the first surface side. 15. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the sheet comprises a copper layer and first and second graphene layers sandwiching the copper layer. 16. A wire-drawing system, comprising: a die unit comprising an opening; an extracting unit configured to and operating to extract an inner layer of a wrapped sheet to form a spiral, wherein the sheet comprises a plurality of copper layers and a plurality of graphene layers; and a feeding unit arranged to feed the spiral through the opening of the die unit. 17. The system according to claim 16, wherein the opening has one of an elliptic cross section and a circular cross section. 18. The system according to claim 16 or 17, wherein the opening has an inclination 

 angle with respect to a feeding direction of the spiral. 19. The system according to any of the claims 16 to 18, wherein die unit comprises a first opening and a second opening downstream of the first opening in a feeding direction, wherein the second opening is smaller than the first opening. 20. The system according to any of the claims 16 to 19, wherein the feeding unit comprises a pulling unit adapted to pull the spiral through the opening.
